diffs.diff:
--- a/dataset.py
+++ b/dataset.py
@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@
 from torch.utils.data import Dataset

 import albumentations as A

 from albumentations.pytorch import ToTensorV2

+import cv2

 

 

 class ADE20KDataset(Dataset):

@@ -32,7 +33,10 @@
         # Build transforms

         if is_train:

             self.transform = A.Compose([

-                A.RandomResizedCrop(height=crop_size, width=crop_size, scale=(0.5, 2.0), ratio=(0.75, 1.333)),

+                A.RandomScale(scale_limit=(-0.5, 1.0), p=1.0),  # scale 0.5x to 2.0x

+                A.PadIfNeeded(min_height=crop_size, min_width=crop_size, 

+                             border_mode=cv2.BORDER_CONSTANT, value=0, mask_value=255),

+                A.RandomCrop(height=crop_size, width=crop_size),

                 A.HorizontalFlip(p=0.5),

                 A.ColorJitter(brightness=0.3, contrast=0.3, saturation=0.3, hue=0.1, p=0.5),

                 A.Normalize(mean=self.mean, std=self.std),

@@ -57,9 +61,11 @@
         mask = np.array(Image.open(ann_path))  # uint8, 0=unlabeled, 1-150=classes

         

         # Remap: 1-150 -> 0-149, 0 -> 255 (ignore)

-        mask_remapped = mask.astype(np.int64) - 1  # 0->-1, 1->0, ..., 150->149

+        mask_remapped = mask.copy().astype(np.int16)

+        mask_remapped = mask_remapped - 1  # 0->-1, 1->0, ..., 150->149

         mask_remapped[mask == 0] = 255  # unlabeled -> ignore

-        mask_remapped = mask_remapped.astype(np.uint8)  # 255 wraps correctly for uint8

+        mask_remapped[mask_remapped < 0] = 255

+        mask_remapped = mask_remapped.astype(np.uint8)

         

         transformed = self.transform(image=image, mask=mask_remapped)

         image_t = transformed['image']  # (3, H, W) float
